tools.name: list_users
tools.label: List Users
tools.adminQuery: query { administrators { items { id firstName lastName emailAddress } } }

tools.name: store_summary
tools.label: Store Summary
tools.description: Quick store overview: product count, order count, customer count
tools.adminQuery: query { products(options: { take: 0 }) { totalItems } orders(options: { take: 0 }) { totalItems } customers(options: { take: 0 }) { totalItems } }

tools.name: last_orders
tools.label: Last Orders
tools.adminQuery: query { orders(options: { take: 5 sort: { createdAt: DESC } }) { items { id code state total totalWithTax currencyCode customer { firstName lastName } createdAt } } }

tools.name: browse_catalog
tools.label: Browse Catalog
tools.shopQuery: query { search(input: { take: 10 }) { items { productId productName slug price { value currencyCode } productAsset { preview } } } }
